requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Evidence for Colombia Projects
requirement_topic.zh: 哥伦比亚项目中的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据
requirement_topic.zht: 哥倫比亞項目中的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據

summary.en: IEC 62619 is an international safety standard for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications, and IEC 62933 is the IEC series for electrical energy storage systems. In Colombia, these standards should be treated as project, buyer, lender, insurer, engineering, or RETIE-equivalence evidence unless a Colombian law, RETIE decision, tender, grid requirement, or contract expressly makes a specific clause or edition mandatory.
summary.zh: IEC 62619是工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全国际标准，IEC 62933是IEC电能存储系统系列标准。在哥伦比亚，除非哥伦比亚法律、RETIE决定、招标文件、电网要求或合同明确要求特定条款或版本，否则这些标准应视为项目、买方、融资方、保险方、工程或RETIE等效性证据。
summary.zht: IEC 62619是工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全國際標準，IEC 62933是IEC電能儲存系統系列標準。在哥倫比亞，除非哥倫比亞法律、RETIE決定、招標文件、電網要求或合約明確要求特定條款或版本，否則這些標準應視為項目、買方、融資方、保險方、工程或RETIE等效性證據。

standards_or_laws: RETIE recognition or equivalence route where applicable

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are highly relevant China-origin BESS battery standards, but they are not one-for-one substitutes for IEC 62619 or IEC 62933 evidence when a Colombian project document asks for IEC clauses, system safety documentation, functional safety assumptions, or grid-storage performance evidence.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是高度相关的中国来源BESS电池标准，但当哥伦比亚项目文件要求IEC条款、系统安全文件、功能安全假设或电网储能性能证据时，它们不能一一替代IEC 62619或IEC 62933证据。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是高度相關的中國來源BESS電池標準，但當哥倫比亞項目文件要求IEC條款、系統安全文件、功能安全假設或電網儲能性能證據時，它們不能一一替代IEC 62619或IEC 62933證據。

gap.en: Map China cell, module, rack, BMS, PCS, EMS, enclosure, HVAC, and fire-mitigation evidence to the exact IEC clauses requested by the Colombia buyer, lender, engineer, RETIE reviewer, or grid study. Confirm editions before relying on bare standard numbers.
gap.zh: 应将中国电芯、模组、电池架、BMS、PCS、EMS、箱体、暖通和消防缓解证据映射到哥伦比亚买方、融资方、工程师、RETIE审查方或并网研究要求的具体IEC条款。依赖裸标准号前，应确认版本。
gap.zht: 應將中國電芯、模組、電池架、BMS、PCS、EMS、箱體、暖通和消防緩解證據映射到哥倫比亞買方、融資方、工程師、RETIE審查方或併網研究要求的具體IEC條款。依賴裸標準號前，應確認版本。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-specific unless incorporated by RETIE, a Colombian authority, grid requirement, tender, contract, lender requirement, or insurer requirement
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where its Chinese scope applies; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended unless made mandatory by procurement, project approval, or another instrument

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC evidence may be commercially important in Colombia BESS projects, but mandatory status depends on the specific Colombian instrument or contract. Do not rely on China GB reports without an IEC crosswalk.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC证据在哥伦比亚BESS项目中可能具有商业重要性，但强制性取决于具体哥伦比亚文件或合同。没有IEC交叉映射时，不应直接依赖中国GB报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC證據在哥倫比亞BESS項目中可能具有商業重要性，但強制性取決於具體哥倫比亞文件或合約。沒有IEC交叉映射時，不應直接依賴中國GB報告。
